title: Micromeles epidendron
taxonomy: Micromeles epidendron is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is native to East Asia and is a small shrub or tree. The species name 'epidendron' refers to the epipetalous stamens, which are the stamens attached to the petals of the flower. Micromeles epidendron is also known as the Chinese plum or Japanese plum. The plant is often used as an ornamental or for its edible fruit.
